variants: Samira Abid is a talented landscape architect known for her innovative designs and commitment to sustainability. She holds the professional license of an Astrostatic Engineer Permit, which enhances her understanding of environmental dynamics in her projects. Samira is also an active member of the Dragonfly Candlemakers Guild, where her passion for art and craftsmanship flourishes. Under the mentorship of Karishma Mehta, she honed her skills and cultivated her expertise in landscape architecture. Her groundbreaking work has received funding from the Limestone Dream Agency, allowing her to push the boundaries of traditional landscape design.
